subjects.appearance_details: tall slender bamboo culms with segmented joints, narrow green leaves, and clustered vertical rhythm
subjects.relationship: primary moving foliage framing the courtyard path
subjects.location: along the stone path inside a traditional Chinese courtyard
subjects.relative_size: tall compared with the path and shrubs, smaller than the surrounding roofline
subjects.orientation: mostly vertical with leaves extending outward over the walkway
subjects.pose: rooted and lightly bending in the breeze
subjects.action: sway gently, casting moving shadows on the mossy stone path
subjects.state_changes: leaves flutter, stalks flex slightly, and sunlight shifts across their green surfaces
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: smooth green segmented stalks with fine leaves

subjects.appearance_details: delicate branches carrying soft pink blooms, scattered petals, and dark textured bark
subjects.relationship: contrasting floral subject complementing the green bamboo
subjects.location: beside the winding path and near the courtyard architecture
subjects.relative_size: medium trees, wider than individual bamboo stalks but lower than the roofline
subjects.orientation: branches arching over the path and toward the courtyard center
subjects.pose: rooted with flowering branches extended outward
subjects.action: release a few petals while blossoms tremble in the breeze
subjects.state_changes: petals drift onto the stone path and pink highlights brighten in the sunlight
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: dark bark, fine twigs, soft pink flower petals

background_setting: A tranquil courtyard with a winding moss-edged stone path, traditional Chinese architecture, a low curved roof, carved wooden details, bamboo, and plum blossoms.

lighting.conditions: soft afternoon sunlight filtered through leaves and roof edges, with gentle dappled shadows on stone and moss
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: soft afternoon sunlight filtered through leaves and roof edges, with gentle dappled shadows on stone and moss

aesthetics.composition: quiet harmony, green bamboo against pink blossoms, weathered stone, traditional craftsmanship, balanced natural calm
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: quiet harmony, green bamboo against pink blossoms, weathered stone, traditional craftsmanship, balanced natural calm

cinematography.camera_motion: slow forward dolly along the winding path, framed by bamboo in the foreground and curved rooflines in the background
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: realistic historical courtyard text-to-video with detailed foliage, carved wood, and natural breeze motion
artistic_style: classical Chinese garden realism with meditative pacing
context: The video moves through a peaceful courtyard where bamboo and plum blossoms sway beside traditional architecture.

actions.description: The camera enters the courtyard path as bamboo leaves sway in soft afternoon light.
Pink plum blossoms tremble above mossy stones while petals drift across the walkway.
The shot settles on the curved roof and carved wood framed by bamboo and flowers.

segments.description: A moss-edged stone path leads into a quiet courtyard framed by green bamboo.
segments.key_changes: Foreground bamboo leaves begin swaying and reveal the path depth.
segments.camera: slow forward dolly from path height

segments.description: Plum blossoms and bamboo move together in the breeze beside traditional architecture.
segments.key_changes: A few pink petals fall and dappled shadows slide over the stones.
segments.camera: smooth glide with slight pan toward the flowering trees

segments.description: The courtyard composition resolves into bamboo, blossoms, curved roof, and carved wood.
segments.key_changes: Architecture becomes the background anchor while the foliage keeps moving softly.
segments.camera: steady framed hold with layered foreground leaves

temporal_caption: Soft afternoon light fills a traditional courtyard where bamboo sways, plum blossoms drift, and a mossy stone path leads past carved wooden architecture.
audio_description: bamboo leaves rustling, faint birdsong, soft breeze, occasional petals brushing stone
